ddls:
CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_type" INTEGER /* ID of the setting type */,
  "location" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the setting */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., open, closed, under maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_setting_type FOREIGN KEY ("setting_type") REFERENCES setting_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting where the case was reported */,
  "case_type" INTEGER /* ID of the case type */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., confirmed, recovered, deceased) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* List of symptoms (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the case (e.g., recovered, hospitalized, deceased) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type FOREIGN KEY ("case_type") REFERENCES case_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, administrator) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_staff" (
  "non_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-staff individual */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting associated with the non-staff individual */,
  "non_staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-staff individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the non-staff individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_staff_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting where the death occurred */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "next_of_kin_name" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "next_of_kin_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the next of kin */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, health official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings_staff" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id", "staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings_non_staff" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the setting */,
  "non_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-staff individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id", "non_staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setting_settings" (
  "setting1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first setting */,
  "setting2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting1_id", "setting2_id")
)
